uplink.description: Status report - leak detected, healthy battery, no shock alarm
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; wire interpretation confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt 0x78=120 -> 12.0 V, WaterLeak byte 1 -> Leak, ShockTamperAlarm byte 0 -> NoAlarm). lowBattery surfaced as a boolean extra.

uplink.description: Status report - no leak, shock/tamper alarm, low battery
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; wire interpretation confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt 0xA4 high bit set -> low battery, 0x24=36 -> 3.6 V; WaterLeak byte 0 -> noLeak; ShockTamperAlarm byte 1 -> Alarm).

uplink.description: Device info / startup version frame (no measurement)
uplink._note: Upstream example startup frame: bytes[3]==0x00 is a version/datecode report carrying no measurement, so we report an error rather than emit a measurement.

uplink.description: Config command response on fPort 23 (no measurement)
uplink._note: Upstream example ConfigReportRsp; fPort 23 carries config command responses, not measurements.
